title: Take control of your agreements
heading_path: Handle agreements from first draft, to signature, to management
text:
- AI-trained on real contracts

  15% higher precision performance for legal and business agreements. Iris is trained on data from real-world, anonymized agreements with user consent.
- 1000+ partner integrations

  Automate your workflows from draft to signature and beyond. Docusign IAM integrates with 1000+ apps (including Salesforce and Microsoft) so teams can keep using the tools they rely on.
- Enterprise-grade trust

  Ensure your most sensitive contract data stays private and secure. In fact, Docusign meets or exceeds stringent US, EU, and global security standards.
- Data you can act on faster

  Turn static PDFs into a searchable database to help surface renewal dates, obligations, and revenue opportunities with our smart agreement repository.

title: Take control of your agreements
text:
- ###

  Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) is a category of cloud software. While every organization depends on agreements for many of its vital day-to-day activities, the processes that manage them are often slow, manual, and error-prone, leaving critical business data locked in static, flat files. IAM helps organizations transform the way they create, commit to, and manage their agreements, helping improve efficiency, reduce risk, and unlock additional value from agreements.
- ###

  Docusign CLM is an enterprise application that helps organizations store, organize, and manage contracts, vendor information, standard clauses, and templates. It is also a core application within the Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform. IAM is a unified, cloud-based platform that connects every step of the agreement process—from creation and negotiation to signing and ongoing management—powered by one system of record, one security and compliance framework, and one AI layer in Iris. Together, CLM and IAM give your organization end-to-end visibility, streamlined workflows, and the ability to unlock real value from your agreements.
- ###

  eSignature is part of the Docusign IAM platform and included in all IAM plans.

  You can buy eSignature in a standalone [eSignature plan](https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/esignature) or as part of an [IAM plan](https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/iam).
- ###

  If you’re an existing eSign or CLM customer, nothing changes. You’ll continue to see new innovations deployed to your existing applications. Once IAM plans and applications are available in your region, you’ll have the opportunity to access new plans that include exciting new capabilities, with no migration required. During this time, you’ll still be able to purchase or renew with your current eSignature and CLM plan.

  New customers can continue to try [eSignature for free.](https://trial.docusign.com)
- ###

  All IAM plans and applications are currently available globally.

  [Explore Plans and Pricing](https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/iam)

title: Take control of your agreements
text:
IAM supports agreements as flexible and dynamic as the way you run your business.

[### Contact Sales

Talk with an expert to learn more about how IAM can help your business.](https://www.docusign.com/contact-sales)

[### Explore IAM Plans and Pricing

Find the IAM plan that best fits your business needs.](https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/iam)[### Find a Partner

For your every need, end-to-end.](https://www.docusign.com/partners)

- ¹

  OnePulse Survey of 1,000 Americans, December 2025
- ²

  Docusign Customer Relationship Survey conducted in March-Sept 2025 by Docusign
- ³

  Deloitte and Docusign report: Unlocking the Value of Agreement Management

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
Read about Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM). See how it
helps organizations of all kinds create smarter agreements, commit to agreements
efficiently, and manage agreements to realize their full value.

Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) applications are
purpose-built for the needs of their target audiences and industries. Each application
comprises Docusign core capabilities and platform services.

- **IAM Core** Designed for you to customize your own solution. Use modular platform
  services, build your apps on top, or customize with an app from the Docusign App Center.
- **IAM for CX** Designed for product managers who want to improve conversion, reduce
  abandonment, and deliver a frictionless experience for customers.
- **IAM for Sales** Designed for sales teams to close deals faster by generating smart
  contracts and connecting the agreement process with CRM systems.

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
IAM helps organization and business leaders manage their agreements flexibly and
dynamically. IAM is designed for professionals across sales, HR, legal, procurement,
product management, IT, and customer experience.

- Create agreements in a collaborative, automated, and integrated way with all
  business processes and systems.
- Commit, send, and sign securely, with identities verified quickly without days of
  waiting.
- Manage agreements and monitor how the organization and its suppliers and partners are
  meeting obligations, while mitigating risks. Answer questions like:

  - Did we get what we paid for?
  - Have we delivered on our promises?
  - Have we met our customers’ expectations?

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
The following IAM platform services underpin the IAM applications:

Docusign Agreement Manager
:   A smart repository that organizations use to store, manage, and analyze
    agreements from any source. Agreement Manager effectively transforms unstructured
    agreements into structured data. With Agreement Manager, you can easily find
    agreements, access vital information quickly, and gain valuable insights
    from your agreements through AI.

Docusign Workflow Builder
:   Helps you create flexible, customizable agreement workflows without writing
    any code. With Docusign Workflow Builder, you can configure custom
    workflows quickly, using Docusign capabilities like
    eSignature, ID Verification, and Data Verification with third-party apps to
    connect to your business processes.

Docusign App Center
:   An ecosystem of developers and partners, where you can discover, install,
    and connect a wide variety of apps to integrate your existing systems into
    Docusign IAM.
:   - Record customer information with HubSpot and Salesforce.
    - Trigger a new workflow with ServiceNow.
    - Extract agreement data with Quik!
    - Generate a payment subscription with Stripe.
    - Archive completed documents with Box, Dropbox, Google Drive,
      Microsoft OneDrive or SharePoint, and Prisidio.

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
An extension app integrates third-party functionality into the agreement process by launching
requests to a third-party service or custom API from within Docusign.

The app is incorporated into a Docusign envelope or workflow at one or more
extension points, for example, in an envelope field or workflow step. When a
recipient completes the envelope field or workflow step, the extension app
functionality is triggered.

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
Core capabilities uniquely address each step of the agreement process, with select
capabilities included in our applications to help you transform your business.

Web Forms
:   Build dynamic forms with no coding. Get agreements completed faster by
    pre-populating them with data from completed forms and from external systems
    through APIs.

Document generation
:   Create and update templates to generate custom, accurate, and
    professional-looking agreements quickly.

Identify
:   Verify signer identity seamlessly to protect important agreements and your
    customer experience.

eSignature
:   Give consumers, partners, employees, and vendors a convenient, fast signing
    experience for practically any type of agreement on almost any device.
    Custom branding and responsive signing provide more intuitive
    experiences.

CLM
:   Manage contracts more easily, faster, and with less risk.

Workspaces
:   A place to bring people, agreements, and information together for multi-step
    agreement processes.

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Example: Workflow for patient intake form at a large healthcare clinic
text:
![Diagram that shows 6 steps that match the workflow for a patient intake form described in the following section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/gxt1715008698191/page/images/Example-IAM-Core-workflow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI2NjEsInNoZWFmIjoiZ3h0MTcxNTAwODY5ODE5MSJ9.7Mjam1AStBdVNcISHf9QQVJbi4pKfXYXcsF_nkWbddM&_LANG=enus "Diagram that shows 6 steps that match the workflow for a patient intake form described in the following section.")

1. **Docusign Workflow Builder** Clinic administrators initiate the intake process
   within Docusign Workflow Builder by entering the patient details.
2. **Web Forms** An email is sent to the patient with a link to complete the new patient web
   form. The patient enters personal information such as name, contact details,
   current medical conditions, and medication.
3. An envelope is created automatically with the new patient agreement documents using a **Docusign eSignature template**. The data provided by the
   patient in step 2 is merged into Docusign fields. The patient
   can review and sign the document on a mobile device.
4. An email notification is sent to the patient and clinic administrators saying registration
   is complete.
5. Workflow Builder **extension app** The agreement documents and data are sent to the organization's
   custom system of records for storage, data analysis, and automation.
6. **Agreement Manager** The agreement documents and data are saved in Docusign
   Agreement Manager so that they can be searched and analyzed, giving the organization key
   insights about its agreement process.

title: IAM for CX
text:
Read about how Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) for CX
streamlines your entire agreement process from a customer-centric perspective. IAM for CX
uses intelligent automation and industry-specific integrations to maximize your customer
reach and drive faster conversions.

Docusign IAM for CX streamlines the entire agreement process from a
customer-centric perspective. IAM for CX uses intelligent automation and
industry-specific integrations to maximize your customer reach and drive faster
conversions.

title: IAM for CX
text:
IAM for CX offers the following benefits:

Increase conversions
:   Optimize agreements for speed and security to boost conversion rates. Save
    customers time by pre-filling data, embedding forms into existing workflows,
    and tailoring steps based on customer attributes.

Minimize agreement friction
:   Empower customers to agree instantly, practically anywhere, on virtually any
    device. Reduce the risk of fraud while maximizing customer satisfaction and
    interoperability.

Serve customers better
:   Easily adapt agreement processes to business needs with no coding.

Build trust
:   Increase customer confidence that their data is protected through
    enterprise-grade security, controls, access, and organizational
    management.

Docusign Workspaces
:   Simplify multi-step transactions by centralizing all agreements in a secure,
    collaborative hub.

title: IAM for CX
heading_path: Is IAM for CX suitable for my business?
text:
Any customer-facing agreements can benefit from IAM for CX.

For example, you can boost conversion rates for self-service processes like membership
applications and account opening. By providing a seamless agreement process, IAM for
CX reduces friction that can cause customer abandonment.

IAM for CX can also save employees time when assisting customers with applications,
like event and venue contracts or services quotes. Employees can prepare agreements
more quickly through templates and document generation, giving them time to focus on
other critical tasks.

For more information, contact the Docusign Sales team through the [Connect with our sales team](https://www.docusign.com/contact-sales) page.

title: IAM for CX
text:
IAM for CX is based on the following core capabilities:

Web Forms
:   Streamline data collection and speed up signing in one interactive
    experience.

Multi-channel delivery
:   Close business faster with real-time notifications through SMS or WhatsApp.

Identity Verification
:   Use embedded in mobile-first signing to capture government-issued IDs and verify identity.
    AI-powered biometric identity checks confirm that IDs provided are genuine,
    signers are physically present, and that signers' faces match their
    IDs.

Docusign Workflow Builder
:   Build customizable agreement workflows that extend beyond eSignature. Create and use
    workflows to automate agreement processes without writing any code.

Docusign App Center
:   Access ready to install extension applications that integrate additional
    functionality.

Premium Data Verification
:   Verify complex data entered into your documents, such as information from a
    bank account and social security number, against external data sources in
    real time.

title: IAM for CX
text:
![Diagram that shows 7 steps that match the loan application workflow described in the following section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/gxt1715008698191/page/images/IAM-for-CX-example-workflow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI2ODcsInNoZWFmIjoiZ3h0MTcxNTAwODY5ODE5MSJ9.mGb1A32-afSQimErfZT2IJ4qlCM24duSYNhtWFV2xKQ&_LANG=enus "Diagram that shows 7 steps that match the loan application workflow described in the following section.")

1. **Workflow Builder workflow** A customer selects a button on a lender website to start
   a loan application.

   Because the lender customized its Docusign account branding, the agreement steps reflect the lender's logo and
   colors.
2. Customers are automatically redirected to the Docusign
   Identify platform to provide proof of identity using Docusign
   ID Verification.
3. A branching rule within the Workflow Builder workflow lets customers whose identity has
   been verified to move to the next step.
4. A step in the workflow extracts data from the customer IDs, including legal
   name, birth date, ID number, and expiration date. Some of this data is used to
   populate fields in later steps.
5. Customers who passed the identity verification are prompted to complete a Docusign web form with their application details. Some of the
   data collected through the identity verification process is automatically copied
   into the form.
6. **Docusign eSignature** After submitting the form, the
   customer is redirected to Docusign eSignature, to review and
   sign the application documents. The envelope is routed to the loan approval
   team. An email notification is sent to the customer and approval team to inform
   them of the approval status.
7. The agreement documents and data are sent through the Salesforce extension app
   to the lender's Salesforce instance for storage, data analysis, and additional
   automation.

title: IAM Core
text:
Read about how you can customize your own Docusign Intelligent
Agreement Management (IAM) solution through IAM Core. Use modular platform services, build
your own apps on top, or customize with an app from the Docusign App
Center.

Docusign IAM Core is an application built for organizations of any size in
almost any industry. IAM Core is a customizable solution that can be extended through
app extensions available through the Docusign App Center.

title: IAM Core
text:
IAM Core offers multiple benefits that can help businesses in all industries streamline
agreement processes, while reducing risk and gaining insights into agreement.

Accelerate revenue
:   Empower customers to agree instantly, on almost any device, with secure
    signing solutions. Plus, automate customized agreement workflows across your
    essential business systems to accelerate deal closures.

Reduce risk
:   Minimize manual errors and improve data integrity with seamless two-way data
    syncing between Docusign and other applications. Maximize
    control and security with centralized user and account management.

Unlock agreement value
:   Transform unstructured agreement data into actionable insights through
    native AI data extractions, and uncover hidden opportunities within your
    agreements.

title: IAM Core
heading_path: Is IAM Core right for my business?
text:
IAM Core supports objectives common to businesses in every industry, such as growing a retail
business, expanding a contingent workforce, and streamlining employee requests.

title: IAM Core
text:
IAM Core comes in three plan levels:

Standard
:   The Standard plan offers access to eSignature features like envelopes and
    collaborative commenting, and includes Docusign Agreement Manager
    and Docusign Workflow Builder.

Professional
:   The Professional plan builds on core features with advanced communication
    and data collection capabilities.

Enterprise
:   The Enterprise plan provides advanced customization and security
    features.

All plan levels include the following capabilities and platform services:

Docusign Workflow Builder
:   Build customizable agreement workflows that extend beyond eSignature. Create
    and use workflows to automate end-to-end agreement processes without writing
    any code.

Docusign Agreement Manager
:   Store, manage, and analyze all of your agreements from a central repository.
    Improve contract intelligence by extracting contract elements with AI.

Docusign eSignature
:   Sign and end electronic documents easily and securely.

Docusign Workspaces
:   Simplify multi-step transactions by centralizing all agreements in a secure,
    collaborative hub.

title: IAM Core
heading_path: Example: Grow a retail business with new partners
text:
IAM Core helps a retail business with multiple brands efficiently onboard retail partners. The
business uses IAM Core to cultivate relationships with those partners to expand its
business.

![Diagram that shows 5 steps that match the process for growing a retail business described in the following section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/gxt1715008698191/page/images/Grow-a-retail-business.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI2ODMsInNoZWFmIjoiZ3h0MTcxNTAwODY5ODE5MSJ9.cxUc2GV1vFbWv94GnapijrIrXYOQf45MSlEMUIs_tbY&_LANG=enus "Diagram that shows 5 steps that match the process for growing a retail business described in the following section.")

1. The business uses **Web Forms** to gather essential data from new
   retail partners.
2. The data from Web Forms populates **Locked Templates** from which
   non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) are generated automatically.
3. **Expanded Branding** tailors NDAs for specific brands and **Workspaces**
   provides a hub for bringing the right people, documents, and forms together in
   one place.
4. When retail partners are ready to sign, **Workflow Builder** automates approval and
   signing workflows with no coding required.
5. After the NDAs are signed, **Agreement Manager** organizes the documents in a central
   repository and uses AI to extract key details for better vendor management.

title: IAM for Sales
text:
Read about the Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) for
Sales application and how it helps sales teams create, commit, and manage sales agreement
processes. Access links to related sources of information, including support and education.

Docusign IAM for Sales is a line of business and industry-specific
application for sales teams. IAM for Sales uses a unique set of capabilities to help
teams digitize their sales agreement process. AI extracts valuable information from
static documents, letting teams make smarter decisions and capture more value out of
deals.

title: IAM for Sales
text:
IAM for Sales offers your sales team multiple advantages:

- Close more deals by enhancing seller productivity and removing friction
- Configure agreement workflows that automatically route to the right stakeholders
  based on agreement contents
- Generate agreements from tools you already use through seamless
  integrations
- Accelerate the signing process by reaching customers on their phones and
  tablets
- Identify opportunities to maximize revenue from existing customers and new
  prospects

title: IAM for Sales
heading_path: Is IAM for Sales right for my business?
text:
IAM for Sales can help your sales, operations, or IT organization achieve the following goals,
regardless of your industry. Whether you are currently using Docusign eSignature or you are new to Docusign,
IAM for Sales can benefit your organization.

- Get a birds-eye view of your contract portfolio to answer questions like:
  - Which agreements renew this month?
  - What agreements include the clause "force majeure"?
- Automate workflows beyond the signing stage and connect Docusign with
  other applications
- Streamline the way agreements are prepared prior to signature
- Collaborate with sellers who work with Salesforce

title: IAM for Sales
text:
IAM for Sales includes the following platform services:

Docusign Workflow Builder
:   Build customizable agreement workflows that extend beyond eSignature. Create
    and use workflows to automate agreement processes without writing any
    code.

Docusign App Center
:   Select ready to install extension applications that integrate additional
    functionality.

Docusign Admin
:   Centralize control while improving system-wide visibility and administrator
    efficiency.

Docusign Agreement Manager
:   Store, manage, and analyze your agreements from a central location. Improve
    contract intelligence by extracting contract elements with AI.

Data Verification
:   Verify signer-provided information, such as email address and phone number,
    in real time.

Docusign Monitor
:   Detect potential threats and protect agreements with around-the-clock
    activity tracking. Docusign Monitor is available as an
    extension.

Gen for Salesforce
:   Speed up the deal cycles with easily configurable agreements.
    Effortlessly merge customer, product and pricing data to generate sales
    documents.

title: IAM for Sales
text:
![Diagram that shows 8 steps that match the sales contract renewal process described in the following section.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/gxt1715008698191/page/images/Sales-contract-renewal-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjI2OTAsInNoZWFmIjoiZ3h0MTcxNTAwODY5ODE5MSJ9.vZI5Pa6vAHpBkDovxjqHVlxpwLKtB0r4d6_-3ULkgSg&_LANG=enus "Diagram that shows 8 steps that match the sales contract renewal process described in the following section.")

1. **Docusign Workflow Builder** An account manager enters customer details and
   launches the sales renewal agreement workflow.
2. **Docusign Web Forms** An account team is prompted to complete a Docusign web form with the customer details and contract
   renewal terms.
3. **Docusign ID Verification** An email is sent to the customer with a
   link to verify identity using Docusign ID Verification with
   Liveness.
4. **Docusign eSignature** When the customer's identity is verified, an
   envelope containing the renewal documents is automatically created using a Docusign eSignature template. The data provided by the account
   team in step 2 is merged into Docusign fields.
5. **Docusign eSignature** The customer automatically receives a
   notification with a link to review and sign the renewal contract.
6. **Docusign Workflow Builder** When the contract is signed, an email notification
   goes to the customer and account manager to inform them that the renewal is
   complete.
7. **Docusign Workflow Builder extension app** An extension application for Workflow Builder
   sends the contract documents and data to the custom system of records for
   storage, data analysis, and automation.
8. **Docusign Agreement Manager** The organization gains key insights into their
   agreement process. Agreement Manager can highlight non-standard terms, provide an
   average sales cycle, and present contracts by status.

title: Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management
text:
Find links to helpful resources about Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM). Link to information, learning resources, product documentation, and more.

Intelligent agreement management (IAM) is AI-powered cloud software that helps organizations streamline and automate agreement processes while unlocking the power of valuable data trapped in traditional files.

IAM features a suite of applications built for the specific needs of various individuals, teams, lines of business and industries.

- **IAM for CX** simplifies and automates the agreement process for product managers, and enhances the agreement process experience for their end customers.
- **IAM for Sales** streamlines sales contracting, enabling sellers to create optimal deals more independently, close them faster, and extract more value from them over time.
- **IAM Core** is a general offering for customers who want to design their own package that comes in three plan levels: Standard, Professional, and Enterprise.

For more information, contact Sales through the [Connect with Our Sales Team](https://www.docusign.com/contact-sales) page or see the [Plans and Pricing](https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/) page.

See the [Understanding Your IAM Plan Allowances](https://www.docusign.com/iam/plan-allowances) page for feature allowances associated with the IAM plans and applications
